title: Scorpion
content:
{{CharHub|Scorpion|Mac Gargan}} {{Character |image = SMH BtS Scorpion 2.jpg |real name = {{Conjecture|MacDonald}} Gargan |alias = {{Alias |primary = Mac Gargan{{Ref|SMH}} |codenames = Scorpion[https://pbs.twimg.com/media/HA931X0WgAA1GMH.jpg?name=orig on Twitter - February 12, 2026]}} |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Male |status = In Custody |movie = ''[[Spider-Man: Homecoming]]''
''[[Spider-Man: Brand New Day]]'' (unreleased)[https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/spider-man-brand-new-day-mark-ruffalo-1236232140/ Mark Ruffalo Returning as the Hulk for ‘Spider-Man 4’] |comic = ''[[Spider-Man: Far From Home Prelude]]'' |actor = [[Michael Mando]]}} {{Quote|Relax. This? It's not on you. It's on our, uh... [[Spider-Man|little spider friend]]. I've got some boys on the outside who would love to meet him. You know, take a picture. Slice his throat. Put his head in the dryer.|Mac Gargan to [[Adrian Toomes]]|Spider-Man: Homecoming}} '''{{Conjecture|MacDonald}} "Mac" Gargan''' is a professional criminal and one of [[Adrian Toomes]]' potential buyers. Following an [[Ambush on MV Spirit of America|encounter]] with [[Spider-Man]], Gargan was arrested by the [[FBI]] and vowed revenge, seeking out new allies to help him kill Spider-Man. ==Biography== {{MD|MacDonald Gargan (Earth-199999)}} ===Buying Weapons=== ====Deal with Aaron Davis==== {{Quote|Yeah, this crazy dude I used to work with, he's... he's supposed to be doing a deal with [[Vulture|him]].|[[Aaron Davis]] to [[Spider-Man]]|Spider-Man: Homecoming}} Mac Gargan was involved in conflicts with the [[CIA]] and [[NSA]] during his criminal lifestyle. He piled up an extensive criminal record, which included homicide. During this period, Gargan briefly worked alongside [[Aaron Davis]]. However, their partnership ended sometime before [[2016]], allegedly due to Gargan's dangerous nature, although Davis still kept tabs on him. Eventually, Gargan became affiliated with [[Vulture]] and planned to strike a deal with him on the {{WPS|Staten Island Ferry}} to buy new [[Chitauri]] and [[Ultron]]-based weapons from some of Vulture's [[Adrian Toomes' Crew|crew]] in secret.{{Ref|SMH}} ====[[Ambush on MV Spirit of America|Staten Island Ferry Incident]]==== [[File:Herman Schultz and Mac Gargan.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Gargan makes a deal with [[Herman Schultz]]]] {{Quote|Who's the guy on the left?"
"Mac Gargan, extensive criminal record, including homicide. Would you like me to activate instant kill?|[[Spider-Man]] and [[Karen]]|Spider-Man: Homecoming}} Gargan met [[Herman Schultz]] on board the ''[[MV Spirit of America|Spirit of America]]'' to purchase alien technology from [[Adrian Toomes' Crew]], which he would then use for his own criminal plans. While Gargan was given information from Schultz about where to collect the weapons, he was unknowingly scanned by the [[Spider-Drone]], which relayed Gargan's criminal history to [[Spider-Man]], who was watching the entire transaction from the rooftop of the ferry. [[File:SMH EW Scorpion.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gargan knocked overboard by [[Spider-Man]]]] While Gargan sent one of his men to meet with [[Randy Vale]] and check over the weaponry, Schultz handed over the keys to the van so he could transport the cargo. Before Gargan could take the keys, however, Spider-Man used his [[Web-Shooters]] to snatch them away. Spider-Man attacked the criminals while the surprised Gargan pulled out his gun, but the web-slinger knocked him off the edge of the ferry. Spider-Man then used his webs to catch Gargan in mid-air and leave him just barely hanging onto the ferry's edge. [[File:MacGargan-KnockedOffFerry.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Gargan is knocked overboard by [[Vulture]]]] Spider-Man then webbed Schultz and subdued all of Gargan's allies. Despite holding on for dear life, Gargan was later knocked off the ferry when [[Adrian Toomes]] attacked Spider-Man with his [[Vulture's Exo-Suit|Exo-Suit]]. Toomes smashed into a car that lurched forward into Gargan, plunging him into the water. Gargan survived the impact, albeit with severe injuries on his face and right arm. He was later retrieved by the {{WPS|Coast Guard}} and arrested by the [[FBI]], who had set up a sting operation on the ferry.{{Ref|SMH}} ====Talk with Adrian Toomes==== [[File:SMH Mac Gargan in prison.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Gargan is reunited with [[Adrian Toomes]]]] {{Quote|I've heard a rumor... you know who [[Spider-Man|he]] is."
"If I knew who he was, he'd already be dead.|Mac Gargan and [[Adrian Toomes]]|Spider-Man: Homecoming}} Having been successfully apprehended by the [[FBI]] in the aftermath of the [[Ambush on MV Spirit of America|Ambush on MV ''Spirit of America'']], Gargan was then taken to jail. Later, while walking along the prison corridors, Gargan smiled as he approached [[Adrian Toomes]], who had also been recently defeated by [[Spider-Man]]. Noting his surprise for being imprisoned together, Gargan assured Toomes that the result of the fight with Spider-Man was not his fault. [[File:Mac Gargan damaged face.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Gargan asks for [[Spider-Man]]'s true identity]] Gargan informed Toomes that he blamed Spider-Man for his injuries and had friends on the outside who had come across the hero and also wanted revenge. Gargan revealed he had heard a rumor that Toomes knew Spider-Man's true identity. However, Toomes claimed that Spider-Man would already be dead if Toomes knew who he was. Gargan seemed to accept this before watching as Toomes left to greet his family.{{Ref|SMH}} ==Abilities== *'''Thief''': Gargan was a notorious and dangerous criminal, with connections with sellers like [[Adrian Toomes]], but his connections eventually led to his arrest when [[Spider-Man]] got involved. ==Facilities== ===Prisons=== *'''Prison''': Gargan was sent to prison for purchasing weapons from [[Adrian Toomes]]' [[Adrian Toomes' Crew|crew]]. Gargan found Toomes in the jail and asked if the rumors that Toomes knew [[Spider-Man]]'s identity were true. Toomes told Gargan that he did not, disappointing him. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Allies=== *[[Adrian Toomes' Crew]] **[[Vulture|Adrian Toomes/Vulture]] - Fellow Inmate **[[Shocker|Herman Schultz/Shocker]] **[[Randy Vale]] *[[Prowler|Aaron Davis/Prowler]] - Former Partner {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[CIA]] *[[NSA]] *[[Spider-Man]] *[[FBI]] {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Mac Gargan was a private investigator hired by [[J. Jonah Jameson]] to learn how [[Peter Parker]] managed to get such sensational photos of Spider-Man. Gargan later agreed to become the subject in an experiment which granted him superhuman powers similar to Spider-Man, although it also drove him insane, and he became the criminal known as '''Scorpion'''. Gargan would later be bonded with the [[Symbiotes|symbiote]], becoming the third incarnation of '''[[Venom]]''' following [[Eddie Brock]] and Parker himself. *Gargan has a scorpion tattoo on his neck, referencing his comic book counterpart. This is also similar to his [[w:c:marvel:Maximus Gargan (Earth-1610)|''Ultimate Marvel'' counterpart]] who also had a scorpion tattoo on his neck to reference his [[w:c:marvel:MacDonald Gargan (Earth-616)|mainstream counterpart]]. ==Behind the Scenes== *[[Marlow Warrington-Mattei]] was a stunt double for [[Michael Mando]] in the role of Mac Gargan. ==References== {{Gallery|Scorpion/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP|Mac Gargan}} [[es:MacDonald Gargan]] [[fr:Mac Gargan]] [[ru:Мак Гарган]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Spider-Man: Homecoming Characters]] [[Category:Spider-Man: Brand New Day Characters]] [[Category:Comic Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Bald Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Criminals]]
